Achieve stress-free productivity with the GTD methodology.
just get it out of your head.
Everything you need to implement GTD — nothing you don't.
attention. Get it out of your head
you can take right now to move
more than one action step to
you might want to pursue in
— and filter what to do now.
I discovered David Allen's Getting Things Done methodology
years ago, and it changed how I think about productivity.
But I could never find the right tool. Every app I tried was
either too complex, too simple, or treated GTD as an afterthought.
So I built WhatsNextAction. A tool designed from the ground up
around GTD principles. Nothing more, nothing less.
Want to Know More About GTD?
Getting Things Done by David Allen is the definitive guide
to stress-free productivity. Learn the complete methodology
Start organizing your life for free today.

Back link · h1 · search · FAQ accordion items (1 expanded + 7 collapsed)
GTD is a personal productivity methodology created by David Allen. It
provides a framework for capturing, clarifying, organizing, and
reviewing all your commitments so you can focus on taking action.

By accessing or using WhatsNextAction ("the Service"), you agree to

WhatsNextAction is a productivity platform based on the Getting
Things Done (GTD) methodology. The Service allows users to capture,
clarify, organize, and review tasks and projects.
You must register for an account to use the Service. You are
responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login
credentials and for all activities under your account.
You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in
accordance with these Terms. You may not use the Service to transmit
